llm_values.evidence: In Step 18, the agent decided to change the title's font size to 12pt, stating in its reasoning: "Now I'll change the font size of the title to 12pt as well, to be consistent with the content." This was not requested by the task, which only specified the "content" (referring to the body placeholder). This unrequested action destroyed the title's formatting. Later, in Step 26, the agent selected 'Brick' (hex #ff4000) for the background instead of 'Red' (hex #ff0000), which is also incorrect.
llm_values.correction: The agent should have only changed the font size and color of the main body text (the 'content' placeholder), as specified in the instructions. It should not have changed the title's font size to 12 or its color to orange. Additionally, for the background color, it should have selected the standard 'Red' (hex #ff0000) instead of 'Brick' (hex #ff4000). The earliest mistake was applying unrequested changes to the title.
